name: Obserae
description: Imports network observability from Obserae (spartan-conseil/obserae) — a self-hosted NetFlow/IPFIX collector that reconstructs sessions and builds a cartography of hosts & services. Parses an Obserae YAML export (cartography + sessions) and turns it into network discovery & monitoring data around ASSET: each host becomes/updates an ASSET, each listening service becomes an ASSET↔SERVICE relationship (ASSETSERVICE: protocol/port/service), and each reconstructed flow becomes a NETWORKSESSION (protocol, source↔destination assets/IPs/ports, bytes/packets, first/last seen, state). Surfaced at /network-sessions — useful for asset discovery, monitoring and SOC investigation. Worker-safe (no DB, no network); accepts YAML or JSON.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to an Obserae cartography + sessions export (YAML or JSON). See the connector README for the expected schema.

parameters.name: default_protocol
parameters.help: Protocol assumed when a session/service omits it (default tcp).
